problem id: 4c327b55
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10001000 -> 00011000
  10100110 -> 01000110
  00101110 -> 01011110
  10011010 -> 00111101
  10100001 -> 01001000
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10101110 -> 01010110
  11010010 -> 10101001

query: 01101101
predicted answer: 11011100
